---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for BuildTrack
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: tarunrwt
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? (e.g. "As a site engineer, I need to...")

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this feature to work.

## Which Module?
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Projects / Project Detail
- [ ] Submit DPR
- [ ] Site Issues (AI)
- [ ] Labour Register
- [ ] Reports
- [ ] Materials
- [ ] Financials
- [ ] AI Assistant
- [ ] User Management
- [ ] Landing Page
- [ ] New module

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Mockups, screenshots, or links that help explain the feature.
